title: Junior Revenue Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group!
